The 15-Point Framework

Our research-backed framework evaluates every aspect of your presentation, from speech delivery to content structure, providing comprehensive insights that traditional feedback can't match.

Speech Mechanics
30%
  • 1Pace and Rhythm
  • 2Volume and Projection
  • 3Clarity and Articulation
  • 4Filler Words and Pauses
  • 5Vocal Confidence
Content Quality
40%
  • 6Problem Definition Clarity
  • 7Solution Explanation
  • 8Market Size Validation
  • 9Traction Demonstration
  • 10Financial Projections
Visual Presentation
20%
  • 11Slide Design Effectiveness
  • 12Data Visualization Quality
  • 13Timing and Flow
Overall Effectiveness
10%
  • 14Persuasion and Storytelling
  • 15Confidence and Credibility
